Serialized Form

  • Package io.squid.cybreathe.models

    • Class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell

      class AbstractCell extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • customRate
          double customRate
          The custom rate multiplier for absorption or production.
        • nextPollutionLevel
          double nextPollutionLevel
          The pre-calculated next pollution level (double-buffered).
        • pollutionLevel
          double pollutionLevel
          The current pollution level of the cell.
        • x
          int x
          The x-coordinate of the cell.
        • y
          int y
          The y-coordinate of the cell.

    • Class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid

      class Grid extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cells
          AbstractCell[][] cells
          The 2D array storing cell instances of the grid.
        • height
          int height
          The height of the grid.
        • width
          int width
          The width of the grid.

    • Class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation

      class Simulation extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • avgPollutionHistory
          List<Double> avgPollutionHistory
          History list storing the average pollution levels per tick.
        • grid
          Grid grid
          The grid of cells.
        • parameters
          SimulationParameters parameters
          The parameters configure rules of the simulation.
        • pollutedAirHistory
          List<Integer> pollutedAirHistory
          History list storing the polluted air cells count per tick.
        • speedDelayMs
          int speedDelayMs
          The delay between simulation steps in milliseconds.
        • tickCount
          int tickCount
          The elapsed tick count of the simulation.

    • Class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters

      class SimulationParameters extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • absorptionRate
          double absorptionRate
          Rate at which Vegetation absorbs pollution (0.0 to 1.0).
        • diffusionRate
          double diffusionRate
          Speed at which pollution spreads from Air cells (0.0 to 1.0).
        • windDirection
          WindDirection windDirection
          Direction of atmospheric wind.
        • windStrength
          double windStrength
          Strength of the wind advection effect (0.0 to 1.0).
